name: Coin Cascade
title: Coin Cascade | Weekly Arcade - Arcade Coin Pusher Game
description: Play Coin Cascade free online. Drop coins onto a physics-driven pusher to cascade prizes off the edge. Chain combos and special coins for massive scores! No download required.
keywords: coin pusher, coin cascade, arcade game, physics game, browser game, free game, coin game, pusher game
tips: Drop coins near the center of the pusher for the best cascade potential
Wait for the pusher to pull back before dropping — timing the cycle maximizes push distance
Target clusters of coins near the edge for chain reaction cascades
Special coins are worth more — prioritize dropping near them to push them off
Short, rapid drops are less effective than well-timed single drops
howToPlay: Tap or click to drop a coin onto the moving pusher platform. The pusher slides back and forth, pushing coins toward the edge. When coins fall off the edge, you score points. Chain reactions and special coins multiply your score.
